# SMG-ClassicController-NTSCK
# Original Riivolution patch by Super Hackio https://youtu.be/0evN_8UFGjA?si=LNrhfbt0XWt0uJ0h
# Converted for use with Dolphin's Patch system
# Only enable Nvidia Style OR All-Stars Style, not both.

[OnFrame]
$SMG Classic Controller (Nvidia Style)
0x800009B0:dword:0x9421FFF0
0x800009B4:dword:0x7C0802A6
0x800009B8:dword:0x90010014
0x800009BC:dword:0x483AC18D
0x800009C0:dword:0x48000015
0x800009C4:dword:0x80010014
0x800009C8:dword:0x7C0803A6
0x800009CC:dword:0x38210010
0x800009D0:dword:0x4E800020
0x800009D4:dword:0x9421FFF0
0x800009D8:dword:0x7C0802A6
0x800009DC:dword:0x90010014
0x800009E0:dword:0x80630004
0x800009E4:dword:0x80630000
0x800009E8:dword:0x8803005F
0x800009EC:dword:0x38600000
0x800009F0:dword:0x2C000008
0x800009F4:dword:0x41820018
0x800009F8:dword:0x2C000005
0x800009FC:dword:0x41820008
0x80000A00:dword:0x48000010
0x80000A04:dword:0x38600001
0x80000A08:dword:0x48000008
0x80000A0C:dword:0x38600002
0x80000A10:dword:0x80010014
0x80000A14:dword:0x7C0803A6
0x80000A18:dword:0x38210010
0x80000A1C:dword:0x4E800020
0x80000A20:dword:0x8803005C
0x80000A24:dword:0x2C000002
0x80000A28:dword:0x7DC802A6
0x80000A2C:dword:0x40820014
0x80000A30:dword:0x80030060
0x80000A34:dword:0x48000015
0x80000A38:dword:0x901F0008
0x80000A3C:dword:0x48000108
0x80000A40:dword:0x80030004
0x80000A44:dword:0x48000100
0x80000A48:dword:0x39600000
# Replace Wiimote-Shake with x
0x80000A4C:dword:0x700C0008
0x80000A50:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000A54:dword:0x41820008
0x80000A58:dword:0x616B0020
# Replace HOME with HOME
0x80000A5C:dword:0x700C0800
0x80000A60:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000A64:dword:0x41820008
0x80000A68:dword:0x616B8000
# Replace A with a
0x80000A6C:dword:0x700C0010
0x80000A70:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000A74:dword:0x41820008
0x80000A78:dword:0x616B0800
# Replace B with b
0x80000A7C:dword:0x700C0040
0x80000A80:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000A84:dword:0x41820008
0x80000A88:dword:0x616B0400
# Replace D-Up with D-Up
0x80000A8C:dword:0x700C0001
0x80000A90:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000A94:dword:0x41820008
0x80000A98:dword:0x616B0008
# Replace D-Left with D-Left
0x80000A9C:dword:0x700C0002
0x80000AA0:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000AA4:dword:0x41820008
0x80000AA8:dword:0x616B0001
# Replace D-Right with D-Right
0x80000AAC:dword:0x700C8000
0x80000AB0:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000AB4:dword:0x41820008
0x80000AB8:dword:0x616B0002
# Replace D-Down with D-Down
0x80000ABC:dword:0x700C4000
0x80000AC0:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000AC4:dword:0x41820008
0x80000AC8:dword:0x616B0004
# Replace + with +
0x80000ACC:dword:0x700C0400
0x80000AD0:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000AD4:dword:0x41820008
0x80000AD8:dword:0x616B0010
# Replace - with -
0x80000ADC:dword:0x700C1000
0x80000AE0:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000AE4:dword:0x41820008
0x80000AE8:dword:0x616B1000
# Replace A with ZR
0x80000AEC:dword:0x700C0004
0x80000AF0:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000AF4:dword:0x41820008
0x80000AF8:dword:0x616B0800
# Replace C with y
0x80000AFC:dword:0x700C0020
0x80000B00:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000B04:dword:0x41820008
0x80000B08:dword:0x616B4000
# Replace B with R
0x80000B0C:dword:0x700C0200
0x80000B10:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000B14:dword:0x41820008
0x80000B18:dword:0x616B0400
# Replace Z with ZL
0x80000B1C:dword:0x700C0080
0x80000B20:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000B24:dword:0x41820008
0x80000B28:dword:0x616B2000
# Replace C with L
0x80000B2C:dword:0x700C2000
0x80000B30:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000B34:dword:0x41820008
0x80000B38:dword:0x616B4000
# XXXX = Classic Controller button; YYYY = Wii Remote + Nunchuk button
0x80000B3C:dword:0x7D605B78
0x80000B40:dword:0x4E800020
0x80000B44:dword:0x7DC803A6
0x80000B48:dword:0x483ABA10
0x80000B4C:dword:0x8803005C
0x80000B50:dword:0x2C000002
0x80000B54:dword:0x7DC802A6
0x80000B58:dword:0x4082002C
0x80000B5C:dword:0x80030060
0x80000B60:dword:0x4BFFFEE9
0x80000B64:dword:0x901F0004
0x80000B68:dword:0x80030064
0x80000B6C:dword:0x4BFFFEDD

# Panic Handler
0x8039BF80:dword:0x60000000
0x8039C044:dword:0x60000000
0x804A656C:dword:0x60000000

$SMG Classic Controller (All-Stars Style)
0x800009B0:dword:0x9421FFF0
0x800009B4:dword:0x7C0802A6
0x800009B8:dword:0x90010014
0x800009BC:dword:0x483AC18D
0x800009C0:dword:0x48000015
0x800009C4:dword:0x80010014
0x800009C8:dword:0x7C0803A6
0x800009CC:dword:0x38210010
0x800009D0:dword:0x4E800020
0x800009D4:dword:0x9421FFF0
0x800009D8:dword:0x7C0802A6
0x800009DC:dword:0x90010014
0x800009E0:dword:0x80630004
0x800009E4:dword:0x80630000
0x800009E8:dword:0x8803005F
0x800009EC:dword:0x38600000
0x800009F0:dword:0x2C000008
0x800009F4:dword:0x41820018
0x800009F8:dword:0x2C000005
0x800009FC:dword:0x41820008
0x80000A00:dword:0x48000010
0x80000A04:dword:0x38600001
0x80000A08:dword:0x48000008
0x80000A0C:dword:0x38600002
0x80000A10:dword:0x80010014
0x80000A14:dword:0x7C0803A6
0x80000A18:dword:0x38210010
0x80000A1C:dword:0x4E800020
0x80000A20:dword:0x8803005C
0x80000A24:dword:0x2C000002
0x80000A28:dword:0x7DC802A6
0x80000A2C:dword:0x40820014
0x80000A30:dword:0x80030060
0x80000A34:dword:0x48000015
0x80000A38:dword:0x901F0008
0x80000A3C:dword:0x48000108
0x80000A40:dword:0x80030004
0x80000A44:dword:0x48000100
0x80000A48:dword:0x39600000
# Replace Wiimote-Shake with x
0x80000A4C:dword:0x700C0008
0x80000A50:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000A54:dword:0x41820008
0x80000A58:dword:0x616B0020
# Replace HOME with HOME
0x80000A5C:dword:0x700C0800
0x80000A60:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000A64:dword:0x41820008
0x80000A68:dword:0x616B8000
# Replace A with a
0x80000A6C:dword:0x700C0010
0x80000A70:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000A74:dword:0x41820008
0x80000A78:dword:0x616B0800
# Replace A with b
0x80000A7C:dword:0x700C0040
0x80000A80:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000A84:dword:0x41820008
0x80000A88:dword:0x616B0800
# Replace D-Up with D-Up
0x80000A8C:dword:0x700C0001
0x80000A90:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000A94:dword:0x41820008
0x80000A98:dword:0x616B0008
# Replace D-Left with D-Left
0x80000A9C:dword:0x700C0002
0x80000AA0:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000AA4:dword:0x41820008
0x80000AA8:dword:0x616B0001
# Replace D-Right with D-Right
0x80000AAC:dword:0x700C8000
0x80000AB0:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000AB4:dword:0x41820008
0x80000AB8:dword:0x616B0002
# Replace D-Down with D-Down
0x80000ABC:dword:0x700C4000
0x80000AC0:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000AC4:dword:0x41820008
0x80000AC8:dword:0x616B0004
# Replace + with +
0x80000ACC:dword:0x700C0400
0x80000AD0:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000AD4:dword:0x41820008
0x80000AD8:dword:0x616B0010
# Replace - with -
0x80000ADC:dword:0x700C1000
0x80000AE0:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000AE4:dword:0x41820008
0x80000AE8:dword:0x616B1000
# Replace B with ZR
0x80000AEC:dword:0x700C0004
0x80000AF0:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000AF4:dword:0x41820008
0x80000AF8:dword:0x616B0400
# Replace Wiimote-Shake with y
0x80000AFC:dword:0x700C0020
0x80000B00:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000B04:dword:0x41820008
0x80000B08:dword:0x616B0020
# Replace A with R
0x80000B0C:dword:0x700C0200
0x80000B10:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000B14:dword:0x41820008
0x80000B18:dword:0x616B0800
# Replace Z with ZL
0x80000B1C:dword:0x700C0080
0x80000B20:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000B24:dword:0x41820008
0x80000B28:dword:0x616B2000
# Replace C with L
0x80000B2C:dword:0x700C2000
0x80000B30:dword:0x2C0C0000
0x80000B34:dword:0x41820008
0x80000B38:dword:0x616B4000

# Panic Handler
0x8039BF80:dword:0x60000000
0x8039C044:dword:0x60000000
0x804A656C:dword:0x60000000

$SMG Swap L and ZL
# Swap L with ZL
0x80000B2C:dword:0x700C0080
# Swap ZL with L
0x80000B1C:dword:0x700C2000

$SMG Swap R and ZR
# Swap R with ZR
0x80000B0C:dword:0x700C0004
# Swap ZR with R
0x80000AEC:dword:0x700C0200
